Event: Costumed Adventure
Event Date: 15/03/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: E34
Showstopper Engraving

Enhancement: 1
For the duration of the battle, when attacking, the engraving owner deals damage equal to 89% / 90% / 91% / 92% / 94% / 97% / 100% of their attack to a random enemy.

Enhancement: 2
12000 Crit from the gems
For the duration of the battle, when attacking, the engraving owner deals damage equal to 114% / 115% / 116% / 117% / 119% / 122% / 125% of their attack to 2 random enemies. Damage from the ability ignores 44% / 45% / 46% / 47% / 49% / 52% / 55% of the targets' armor.

Enhancement: 3
25000 Health from the gems
For the duration of the battle, when attacking, the engraving owner deals damage equal to 138% / 139% / 140% / 141% / 144% / 147% / 150% of their attack to 3 random enemies. Damage from the ability ignores 54% / 55% / 56% / 57% / 59% / 62% / 65% of the targets' armor as well as shields and effects that reduce the targets' incoming damage.
